opening_query: My benefits got cut off last month and nobody at the office will explain anything.
Our small counseling practice got a letter terminating our biggest contract without cause and it will sink us.
I was let go unfairly and now I have no income coming in at all. I need legal help this week.
I'm starting an organization with two friends and we need help setting it up properly.
A guy is making money off videos of my performances without any agreement with me.
The city is making it impossible to run our food-truck commissary and we suspect favoritism.
I need to take over my father's finances before he loses everything. Where do I start?
The court gave my aunt control over my grandmother years ago and the family thinks it's time to revisit that.
Dad keeps 'winning' sweepstakes that require processing fees, and this month it was $6,000.
Our aunt's new 'financial planner' has her convinced her family is stealing from her.
The police charged me with assault after an argument with my brother-in-law got physical. I'm terrified.
I was arrested for domestic violence charges I dispute and I can't go home right now.
An online seller took my money for equipment that never arrived and now the website is gone.
A gym I quit two years ago is still charging my card and support just loops me in circles.
The cremation company handled my mother's remains so carelessly that our family is traumatized.
I have a judgment from small claims court but still haven't seen a dime. What's next?
My ex-tenant owes me for a year of damage and unpaid rent and laughed when I said I'd sue.
Our nonprofit is owed a large grant reimbursement from a partner agency that keeps stalling.
I need a lawyer for my criminal case. The public defender isn't fighting for me at all.
My brother called 911 during his crisis and somehow ended up the one facing consequences.
The father of my baby refuses to help with anything and denies she's even his.
My son came home from his dad's with bruises and a story that keeps changing.
I'm terrified my ex will hurt the kids and me if I push for the support he owes.
The hospital sent my bill to collections even though I was making small payments every month.
The same debt collector calls me twenty times a day, even after I sent them a letter.
Terminated from my trucking job and I'm certain the reason they wrote up is a cover story.
I got terminated while deployed with the National Guard and came home to no job.
I need to file for divorce. We've been married four years and there's no fixing this.
I'm leaving my marriage and I have no income of my own right now. What am I entitled to?
I'm being pushed out of my job and they gave me until Friday to make a decision.
I was disciplined at my job unfairly and I want to fight it through every channel I have.
I have a wage claim against my old employer but there's a complication I didn't expect.
The funeral is Friday and the family is already fighting about who's in charge of everything.
My husband's pension check still arrives every month even though he passed in the spring. I'm afraid to touch it.
The house Mom left us has a tenant with a lease Mom signed that runs three more years at half market rent.
An ambulance crew dropped my father during a transfer and he broke his shoulder.
Someone at the courthouse leaked my sealed address to the man I have a protective order against.
We can't afford the house since my husband died and I don't know what my options even are.
A man came to our door offering to 'save' the house and now the deed isn't in our name anymore.
Our lender keeps 'losing' our hardship packet while the late fees pile up month after month.
They're trying to deport my brother and our whole family is falling apart over it.
My husband was detained at his regular immigration check-in this morning and I don't know where he is.
We want to hire a brilliant engineer from abroad but the process defeats me every time I read about it.
A city bus jolted so hard that I was thrown into the fare box and knocked out cold.
My daughter's cheer team practices on mats the gym knows are worn out, and she finally got hurt.
Insurance is refusing to pay for the treatment that literally kept my daughter alive.
The insurance company says my disability isn't 'total' anymore even though nothing about my condition changed.
The nursing home's insurance offered us a settlement for Dad's fall before we even hired anyone.
Someone is stealing my work and selling it as their own. I want to stop them now.
My grandmother's recipes became my bakery's signature line and a chain is now selling knockoffs.
A national brand sent my Etsy shop a letter demanding I destroy all my inventory.
The app I commissioned from a dev shop turned up rebranded in another country's app store.
The state wants a strip of our front acreage for the highway widening and their offer is insulting.
Our church property is under threat from the city's redevelopment plans and the congregation is frightened.
I need help with my DUI case. This whole thing has been a nightmare for my family.
I was cited for driving while suspended but I truly didn't know my license was suspended.
My CDL is my livelihood and something happened this weekend that could take it away.
I finished everything for my DUI years ago but it's still wrecking my insurance and job applications.
I'm terrified because there was an accident and the other driver is talking about pressing charges.
Our uphill neighbor regraded his yard and now every storm sends a river through our property.
The neighbor's dog has terrorized our street for a year and animal control does nothing.
The man behind us screams threats over the fence at my wife whenever I leave for work.
The birth injury changed our lives forever and the hospital's own review admitted 'process failures.'
My realtor 'forgot' to submit our counteroffer and we lost the house we'd been chasing for a year.
The estate lawyer Mom hired put her house into the wrong kind of trust and now Medicaid says she's disqualified.
Someone I had to fire keeps contacting me at home and my family is getting scared.
Someone slashed my tires twice this month and I have a good idea who it is.
My ex is keeping the house we bought together and says I have no rights to it.
My girlfriend moved out and took things that we bought together, including the dog.
My ex-business partner is telling suppliers I stole from the company, and it's killing my new venture.
My teenager's reputation was destroyed by rumors classmates spread about her online.
I need a construction attorney to go after the contractor who did our siding wrong.
I want to sue my contractor. He installed the wrong windows and won't make it right.
We hired a 'friend of a friend' to finish our basement and he vanished mid-job with our money.
My monthly disability check was cut off after a review and I need help getting it back.
I applied for disability twice and got denied both times. My hearing with the judge is in two months.
The office keeps sending my elderly aunt forms she can't understand and threatening to stop her checks.
I'm being audited and my accountant suddenly says I need a lawyer, not just him.
I just discovered my late husband hadn't filed our taxes for six years. I'm terrified of what happens next.
My landlord is trying to make me pay for repairs to the building's roof, which can't be my job.
The place I rent was sold and the new owner says all the old agreements mean nothing now.
I'm trapped in a terrible car loan where the payments eat a third of my income and the car is worth half the loan.
The dealership added $4,000 in 'protection products' I explicitly declined, and it's buried in the contract.
A mobile mechanic 'fixed' my brakes in my driveway and I crashed into my own garage the next morning.
A shelf display collapsed on me at a big-box store and I have a herniated disc now. What should I do?
My son was killed in an equipment accident and our family needs answers about what we can do.
Since the robbery at my store I can't sleep, can't focus, and now I can't work either.
My husband works the docks and got crushed between a container and the bull rail last month.
